expected_behavior: A valid source-backed proposal-store record renders as one Pending Review row without mutating the proposal target.
failure_mode: Pending Review cannot consume real proposal-store records without implying approval or mutating target state.

expected_behavior: An empty proposal store renders explicit zero state instead of inventing pending review rows.
failure_mode: Dashboard Pending Review invents state when there are no proposal-store records.

expected_behavior: An invalid proposal file under .krn/proposals is surfaced as an invalid record and not counted as pending review.
assertions: invalid proposal not counted as pending
failure_mode: Pending Review hides invalid records or counts unparseable files as reviewable proposals.

expected_behavior: A stored proposal whose source refs no longer resolve is rendered with stale source status and blocked queue state.
failure_mode: Pending Review presents stale source-backed proposals as ready for human review.
